name: ai-instruct-sync
description: Keep your AI coding rules and instructions in sync across Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, Aider, Gemini CLI, Continue and more. Features: status/diff/sync/validate/init/convert, --cwd, --apply, --json. Zero dependencies.

scripts.demo: node dist/cli.js status && node dist/cli.js diff && node dist/cli.js validate

author: Bhaskar Pandey <bhaskarauthor@gmail.com>
